# SKParticleRenderOrder.dontCare

**Case**

The particles can be rendered in any order. SpriteKit may choose to reorder the particles to improve rendering performance.

## Declaration

```swift
case dontCare
```

## Constants

- **SKParticleRenderOrder.oldestLast**: The particles are rendered from newest to oldest. This is the default value.
- **SKParticleRenderOrder.oldestFirst**: The particles are rendered from oldest to newest.

items.description: The particles are rendered from newest to oldest. This is the default value.
